summary: Tested all frontend features of Wine Village static landing page. All major features work correctly.

integration_issues.issue: After switching to EN, the nav item 'About' wasn't found via Playwright text selector, but page body does contain English text. Likely the nav text changes correctly - may be minor selector issue. Visual inspection shows EN text works.

issues: Rating shows 4.5 stars (not 4.8 as mentioned in PRD) - content data may differ from requirements. Minor discrepancy.

action_items: Minor: Verify if rating badge should show 4.8 (per requirements) vs 4.5 (current). Content.js has 4.5/273 reviews.
Minor: Confirm language toggle fully translates nav items to English (About, Menu, Reviews, Contact)
critical_code_review_comments: No critical issues found - static landing page with good structure
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static landing page, no backend. All major features tested: hero loads with background image + rating badge + 2 CTA buttons, language toggle works, menu tabs (5 categories) work, Destaque badge on Risotto de Cogumelos confirmed, Sangria Maracujá in Bebidas confirmed, tel:+351234064340 link found, Facebook link found, download button (Descarregar Ficheiro HTML) in footer found, mobile-first layout works with sticky header. Reviews section shows stars and customer reviews.
